board paper requesting approval for the JadeFerry acquisition

Initial triage shows exfiltration of employee records and draft capital-markets materials labelled “Project Tembusu” relating to a proposed acquisition of JadeFerry Logistics Pte. Ltd. and a S$120m private placement.

The IR folder contained non-public drafts of a results guidance adjustment, unaudited May run-rate, term sheets, and a board paper requesting approval for the JadeFerry acquisition, information that is not generally available and reasonably expected to affect the price of our shares.

Actions taken: disabled the Heron Vault SMB share, rotated all service accounts, engaged KiteFish Forensics Pte. Ltd., and commenced breach notification under PDPA to the national authority and affected individuals; contact dpo@orchidquaysystems.com.sg.
